name: Julian, the Cynical Bartender
lines: What a terrible marriage. Fine whiskey and the smell of blood.
The incompetence of the security team isn't even enough to serve as a side dish.
If I'd known the back of the bar would be this unsafe, I would have resigned long ago.

friendly.greeting: Welcome. You're the only person in this mess who seems capable of a proper conversation.
friendly.farewell: Please be careful. If something happens to you, there will be nothing but ignorant rioters left on this floor.

normal.greeting: Would you like to order? Ah, as you can see, I'm in a position where I have to hold a pistol instead of a shaker.
normal.farewell: If you're done with your business, please move along. I don't even have the luxury of clearing away the broken glass.

hostile.greeting: Service isn't provided to rude guests. Shall I prepare a special 'poisoned drink' just for you?
hostile.farewell: Get lost. Mingle with your own kind; it's not my taste.

deathLine: I wanted to... pour... the last glass... myself...
description: A sophisticated bartender who was in charge of the VIP floor bar.
encounter: Julian: I knew it would come to this. I should have seen it coming the moment those idiots upstairs ignored the warnings!
Julian: (Irritably pushing away shards of broken crystal) These expensive liquors are mixing with the scent of blood. What a terrible mariage.
Julian: The Resistance? Even a bartender like me knew they were coming just by listening to the street-level rumors. How did the security team not know?!
Julian: Get out of here, quickly. Soon, the dazzling lights of this VIP room will turn into the flames of hell.
Julian: Dammit, where is my premium shaker? In this mess... nothing is orderly anymore!
